comment.body:
i went to chatgpt and copy/pasted my weekly post to check if it can understand what the post implies (knowing that some ppl do this)
after the 5th trial, it gave some good observations, but i'm telling you once again: don't use it.
it is only a language model, not a logic model.
it won't help, and just confuses you. 

read the post yourself.
if you have to time read a wordsalad, you will have to read the post as well, and think about it on your own, what does it says TO YOU, what it implies FOR YOUR strategy :))

if you have to time read a wordsalad, you will have to read the post as well, and think about it on your own, what does it says TO YOU, what it implies FOR YOUR strategy :))
comment.raw_body:
i went to chatgpt and copy/pasted my weekly post to check if it can understand what the post implies (knowing that some ppl do this)
after the 5th trial, it gave some good observations, but i'm telling you once again: don't use it.
it is only a language model, not a logic model.
it won't help, and just confuses you. 

read the post yourself.
if you have to time read a wordsalad, you will have to read the post as well, and think about it on your own, what does it says TO YOU, what it implies FOR YOUR strategy :))
